summary.lv: WeAreDots meklē vecāko .NET izstrādātāju ar vismaz 5 gadu pieredzi — C#/.NET, MS SQL/PostgreSQL, SOAP/RabbitMQ, vēlams arī React un Azure DevOps; hibrīda darbs Rīgas centrā.
summary.en: WeAreDots is hiring a Senior .NET Developer with 5+ years of experience in C#/.NET, MS SQL/PostgreSQL and SOAP/RabbitMQ, ideally also React and Azure DevOps; hybrid in central Riga.
